title: DelegationToken
description: Phone-issued bundle that authorizes an agent_key to speak for a unique_identifier within the Hearme scope. See ARCHITECTURE.md §8.5. Canonical JSON serialization (sorted keys, no whitespace) is the input to delegation_hash = SHA-256(canonical_json(token)).

zkpassport_proof.description: base64 of canonical-JSON-encoded ZkPassportProof (see zkpassport.json). v0.2 cryptographically verifies the proof's issuer signature and its bindings to scope, nullifier, agent_key, and disclosed predicates. v0.3 replaces the issuer signature with real SNARK verification against ICAO CSCA keys.

unique_identifier.description: base64 of 32 bytes. Stable per (passport, domain, scope).

disclosed_predicates.description: Predicate bundle picked once at install. Keys/values are fixed by the chosen disclosure profile (§8.3).

agent_key.description: base64 of the agent's Ed25519 public key (32 bytes). Phone attests this key speaks for unique_identifier.

phone_signature.description: base64 Ed25519 signature (64 bytes) over the canonical-JSON-encoded bundle with phone_signature removed.
